scripts.sbook-children: npx concurrently "npm run storybook -- --config-dir ../storybook-fonts/.storybook --port 6001 --no-open"  "npm run storybook -- --config-dir ../storybook-icons/.storybook --port 6002 --no-open" "npm run storybook -- --config-dir ../storybook-react/.storybook --port 6003 --no-open" "npm run storybook -- --config-dir ../../packages/react-native/.storybook --port 6004 --no-open" "npm run storybook -- --config-dir ../storybook-tokens/.storybook --port 6005 --no-open" "npm run storybook -- --config-dir ../storybook-assets/.storybook --port 6007 --no-open"
scripts.sbook-parent: npx wait-on http://localhost:6001 && npx wait-on http://localhost:6002 && npx wait-on http://localhost:6003 && npx wait-on http://localhost:6004 && npx wait-on http://localhost:6005 && npx wait-on http://localhost:6007 && npm run storybook
scripts.sbook: npx concurrently "npm run sbook-children" "npm run sbook-parent"
